title: The Skull Dome Battle Spreads
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Law, Kaido, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as Battles spread through the Skull Dome while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the alliance shift the momentum.
scene: Across the Skull Dome, the alliance fights to survive while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the Straw Hats change the flow of battle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: This generation is such a pain...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you had joined me, we could've taken over the world together.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Like any of us would ever team up with an idiot like you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'm definitely gonna send you flying!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Should allow you to devastate your opponent from the inside!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop forcing it, just let the haki flow into your fist!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is in the midst of danger that power truly blossoms!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that first time I took a blow from your club...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...you can use it to coat yourself, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It can only be done by a handful of powerful individuals,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And you've escaped death for the last time!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 27 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
